lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਏ ਆਪਣੈ ਪੰਨੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai satigur raakh lee aapanai panai paae |
lines.english: The Perfect True Guru saves him, making him His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਜਲਤੇ ਜਲਿ ਮੁਏ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਆਏ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai jalate jal mue bhram aae doojai bhaae |
lines.english: In the flames of egotism, he is burnt to death; he wanders in doubt and the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਜਲਤਾ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag jalataa nadaree aaeaa gur kai sabad subhaae |
lines.english: This world is burning; through the Sublime Word of the Guru's Shabad, this comes to be seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਸੀਤਲ ਭਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabad rate se seetal bhe naanak sach kamaae |1|
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Shabad are cooled and soothed; O Nanak, they practice Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜੀਵਦਿਆ ਮੁਇਆ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸੇਈ ਪੁਰਖ ਸੁਜਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur jeevadiaa mueaa na visarai seee purakh sujaan |
lines.english: Those who do not forget the True Guru, in life and in death, are truly wise people.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲਿਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: safalio satigur seviaa dhan janam paravaan |
lines.english: Service to the True Guru is fruitful and rewarding; blessed and acceptable is such a life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਏ ਜੀਵਦੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹਹਿ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mue jeevade paravaan heh manamukh janam maraeh |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are approved in death as in life, while the self-willed manmukhs continue the cycle of birth and death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਲੁ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: kul udhaare aapanaa so jan hovai paravaan |
lines.english: Their families are saved, and they are approved by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੁਏ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਜਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak mue na aakheeeh ji gur kai sabad samaeh |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are not described as dead, who are absorbed in the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਲਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat saadhoo lag har naam samaaeeai |
lines.english: Join the Society of the Holy Saints, and be absorbed in the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: har purakh niranjan sev har naam dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Serve the Immaculate Lord God, and meditate on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਵਡੀ ਕਾਰ ਮੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: har teree vaddee kaar mai moorakh laaeeai |
lines.english: O Lord, glorious and great is service to You; I am so foolish

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਗੋਲਾ ਲਾਲਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਮੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਫੁਰਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: hau golaa laalaa tudh mai hukam furamaaeeai |
lines.english: - please, commit me to it. I am Your servant and slave; command me, according to Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਾ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau guramukh kaar kamaavaa ji gur samajhaaeeai |2|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I shall serve You, as Guru has instructed me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਜਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਲਿਖਿਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa kamaavanaa ji karatai aap likhiaas |
lines.english: He acts according to pre-ordained destiny, written by the Creator Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਠਗਉਲੀ ਪਾਈਅਨੁ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: moh tthgaulee paaeean visariaa gunataas |
lines.english: Emotional attachment has drugged him, and he has forgotten the Lord, the treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਸੇ ਬਹਣਿ ਨ ਮਿਲਨੀ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee guramukh naam na chetio se behan na milanee paas |
lines.english: Those who do not meditate on the Lord, as Gurmukh, are not permitted to sit near the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਜੀਵਦਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਮੁਇਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: mat jaanahu jag jeevadaa doojai bhaae mueaas |
lines.english: Don't think that he is alive in the world - he is dead, through the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਬਹੁ ਅਤਿ ਘਣਾ ਪੁਤੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਨ ਸਾਥਿ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: dukh laagaa bahu at ghanaa put kalat na saath koee jaas |
lines.english: They suffer the most horrible pain and suffering, and neither their sons nor their wives go along with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਕਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਮੁਹੁ ਕਾਲਾ ਹੋਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਉਭੇ ਸਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: lokaa vich muhu kaalaa hoaa andar ubhe saas |
lines.english: Their faces are blackened among men, and they sigh in deep regret.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਕੋ ਨ ਵਿਸਹੀ ਚੁਕਿ ਗਇਆ ਵੇਸਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukhaa no ko na visahee chuk geaa vesaas |
lines.english: No one places any reliance in the self-willed manmukhs; trust in them is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਸੈਣ ਸੇ ਸਜਣਾ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: se sain se sajanaa ji guramukh mileh subhaae |
lines.english: They alone are relatives, and they alone are friends, who, as Gurmukh, join together in love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਅਗਲਾ ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukhaa no sukh agalaa jinaa antar naam nivaas |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs live in absolute peace; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides within them. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਲਗੇ ਸਜਣ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਜਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਵੇਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae lage sajan na aakheeeh ji abhimaan kareh vekaar |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the love of duality are not called friends; they practice egotism and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੇ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa bhaanaa anadin kareh se sach rahe samaae |
lines.english: Night and day, they act according to the True Guru's Will; they remain absorbed in the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਆਪ ਸੁਆਰਥੀ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਨ ਸਕਹਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh aap suaarathee kaaraj na sakeh savaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are selfish; they cannot resolve anyone's affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਆਪਿ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aape jagat upaae kai aap khel rachaaeaa |
lines.english: You Yourself created the world, and You Yourself arranged the play of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak poorab likhiaa kamaavanaa koe na mettanahaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they act according to their pre-ordained destiny; no one can erase it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vich haumai lekhaa mangeeai fir aavai jaaeaa |
lines.english: He is called to account for his deeds done in egotism; he continues coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਆਪਿ ਸਿਰਜਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun aap sirajiaa maaeaa mohu vadhaaeaa |
lines.english: You Yourself created the three qualities, and fostered emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਘੁਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur aapane sadaa sadaa ghumaaeaa |3|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru; forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਮਝਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa har aap kripaa kare se gur samajhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru instructs those whom the Lord Himself blesses with Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਖਾਧੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh khaadhe guramukh ubare jinee sach naam chit laaeaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are eaten away, while the Gurmukhs are saved; they focus their consciousness on the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਣੁ ਦੰਤਾ ਜਗੁ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mamataa mohanee jin vin dantaa jag khaaeaa |
lines.english: The love of Maya is enticing; without teeth, it has eaten up the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਗੁ ਕਮਲਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai jag kamalaa firai guramukh nadaree aaeaa |
lines.english: Without the Name, the world wanders around insane; the Gurmukhs come to see this.
